footer.copyright: North Lume Distribution. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Reliable Product Distribution Across Canada, USA & Brazil
hero.subtitle: With over 8 years of experience, North Lume Distribution supplies high-quality products to gas stations, convenience stores, supermarkets, and retail businesses. We handle the logistics so you can focus on growing your business.

about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: We work directly with brands and manufacturers to bring a curated selection of products to the retail market. From electronics and snacks to toys and accessories, our catalog spans seven categories — stocked and ready to ship.
about.p2: Whether you're a growing brand looking for wider reach or a retailer seeking a dependable supply partner, we tailor our approach to fit your business. Competitive pricing, consistent inventory, and hands-on support come standard.

featured.title: Featured Products
featured.subtitle: A look at some of the brands we carry.

contact_cta.title: Ready to Stock Up?
contact_cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for — we'll handle the rest.

products_page.title: Our Products
products_page.subtitle: North Lume Distribution carries a wide range of products across multiple categories. Browse our catalog to see what we can bring to your shelves.
products_page.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Looking for a distribution partner in Canada, USA, or Brazil? Tell us about your business and we'll get back to you.
contact_page.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.

cookie_consent.message: We use cookies and Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. No personal data is sold or shared.

volt.description: Volt Elite V3 premium cables, earbuds, aux cords, and chargers. Volt Evolution 4-in-1 Tuff fast charge cables in 4ft, 6ft, and 10ft.

tech-361.description: 36pc counter display kit with Type C, braided iPhone, braided Micro USB cables, plus wall and car chargers.

sour-rockstar.description: Sour liquid roller candy, 75ml per piece. 12 pcs per display, 8 displays per case.

gorilla-squeeze.description: Sour gel slime candy in Blue Razz and Strawberry. 56ml dual-flavour package.

tnt-sour-stix.description: Explosive sour candy sticks in a variety of flavors.

cheeky-monkey.description: Gummies and Sours candy cones in mixed flavors. 96pc floor shipper kit.

zaks-jerky.description: Premium Black Angus beef jerky. Traditional 120g in four bold flavors plus 120g Big Bag varieties.

the-butcher.description: Locally made 90g beef jerky in Original, Teriyaki, Hot 'N Sweet, and Hickory Smoke. 80pc shipper kit.

kokum.description: Indigenous-owned Kokum beef jerky in 75g and 175g sizes.

die-cast-cars.description: Officially licensed die-cast cars with real logos, rubber tires, pull-back action, and opening doors. Over 150 models.

3d-minis-creatures.description: Collectible 3D-printed mini figures and articulated creature toys. 110pc floor display kit.

warp-worm.description: Warp Worm novelty toys and fidget items.

charm-buddies.description: Collectible bag charms on a 96pc countertop spinner rack with fun designs.

cool-tats.description: Temporary tattoos in full, half, and small sizes. 120pc floor display with over 100 designs.

sticker-kraze.description: Bamboo stickers made with real wood. Unique vintage look, 2 to 3 inches. 120pc counter display.

bag-swag.description: Trendy bag accessories and decorative swag.

retro-rattlers.description: Retro-styled sunglasses with color-shifting revo lenses and adjustable ear loops. 48pc floor shipper.

fancy-fannys.description: Stylish fanny packs and waist bags.

card-guard.description: Protective card holders and RFID-blocking wallets.

bones.description: All-natural premium pet treats: bully sticks, beef trachea, beef sticks, braided beef, cow ears, and pig ears. 210pc display kit.

campers.description: 34-inch campfire roasting sticks with 10-gauge twisted steel and wooden handles. 55pc shipper kit.
